# feat(prism): Phase 1 — web engines + Flutter foundation + 5 Flutter engines (#1)

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `a7100fa082f7` — feat(prism): Phase 1 — web engines + Flutter foundation + 5 Flutter engines (#1)

**Body**:

Phase 1 delivery (12 commits squashed):

**Specs + compiler**
- 86 YAML specs (15,250 lines) — token schema, 3 themes, layout grammar, navigation, 69 component contracts, 11 page templates
- @kailash/prism-compiler: CLI, YAML parser, web emitter (Tailwind + CSS vars), Flutter emitter (ThemeData + Dart constants)
- prism-scaffold CLI: generates runnable Vite + React projects from theme + template

**Web engine (@kailash/prism-web) — 6 engines**
- Theme (token provider)
- Layout (Stack, Row, Grid, Split, Layer, Scroll)
- Navigation (Sidebar, Topbar, Breadcrumb, badges)
- DataTable (sort, filter, paginate, select, bulk actions, expandable rows, virtual scroll)
- Form (12 field types, validation, sections, conditionals, multi-step wizard)
- AI Chat (7 message types, streaming, stream-of-thought, action plan, suggestion chips)

**Shared atoms (web)**
- Button (5 variants × 3 sizes, loading, icons)
- Badge (6 variants, dot mode)
- Avatar (image + initials fallback, hash color)
- Spinner (3 sizes, accessible)

**Page templates (web) — 11**
Dashboard, List, Detail, Form, Settings, Auth, Conversation, Split, Wizard, Kanban, Calendar

**Flutter engine (kailash_prism)**
- KTheme (full token palette, Material 3 ThemeData light/dark)
- KLayout (KStack, KGrid, KSplit, KBreakpoints, KResponsiveBuilder)
- KNavigation (KAppShell with responsive sidebar/drawer, breadcrumbs)
- KDataTable (typed columns, sort, search, paginate, select, responsive card list on mobile)
- KForm (12 field types, validation, conditionals, sections)

**Quality**
- Red team round 1: 5 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM, 3 LOW findings — all HIGH resolved
- Speed checkpoint passed (~17% of no-Prism estimate on the CRM contacts reference app)
- 281 tests pass: 177 web + 59 compiler + 45 Flutter
- Zero warnings

## Related issues

None (greenfield Phase 1 delivery).
